title: carpinus insularis
intro: Carpinus insularis, also known as the insular hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Carpinus insularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Carpinus insularis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Japanese medicine to treat various ailments.
